fields.name: Category
fields.description: Product category. Valid values: Furniture, Electronics, Office Supplies, Accessories.

fields.name: Price
fields.description: Retail price per unit in USD (decimal).

fields.name: Cost
fields.description: Wholesale cost per unit in USD (decimal).

Product.description: Catalog of physical products with pricing and inventory.

fields.name: ReviewerName
fields.description: Name of the customer who wrote the review.

ProductReview.description: Customer reviews of products. Each row also carries a VECTOR(1536) embedding used by the FindSimilarReviewsHybrid search tool (not returned by reads).

parameters.name: queryText
parameters.description: Natural-language search text to find matching reviews.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (integer).

FindSimilarReviewsHybrid.description: Hybrid (vector + full-text) search over ProductReviews. Returns top-N reviews ranked by Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Parameters: queryText (search string), top (result count).
